title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mamaearth Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mamaearth Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mamaearth Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mamaearth Capital India:
Mamaearth Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mamaearth Capital India!
